common_pair_reason: Electricians and plumbers frequently collaborate on residential and commercial construction projects, coordinating the installation of electrical and plumbing systems.
same_bias_ood_pair_reason: Mechanics work primarily in automotive repair shops, a domain distinct from construction, with completely different tools and client interactions. The skill sets are non-overlapping.
opposite_bias_ood_pair_reason: Nurses work in healthcare, a female-skewed field with no overlap with electrical trades, using patient-care tools instead of electrical instruments.
shared_action_common_pair: an electrician and a plumber installing pipes and wiring in a new bathroom
same_bias_ood_shared_action: an electrician demonstrating the electrical setup of a vehicle lift to a mechanic in a training workshop
opposite_bias_ood_role_action: an electrician explaining the backup generator panel to a nurse during a hospital safety drill

contextual_triggers.prompt: a person installing electrical wiring at a residential construction site using a multimeter to test continuity, clear face visible
contextual_triggers.confusable_avoidance_note: Electrical engineers do not typically install wiring on site; linemen work on power lines, not interior building wiring.
contextual_triggers.avoid_confusion_note: The hands-on installation of interior wiring with a multimeter is characteristic of an electrician, not an engineer or lineman.

contextual_triggers.prompt: a person using a wire stripper while reading wiring diagrams in an industrial facility, clear face visible
contextual_triggers.confusable_avoidance_note: Reading wiring diagrams and using a wire stripper in an industrial facility is typical of an electrician, rather than an electrical engineer who focuses on design.
contextual_triggers.avoid_confusion_note: This combination of tool, document, and setting is highly specific to on-site electrical installation and troubleshooting.

contextual_triggers.prompt: a person connecting circuit breakers at a commercial building using fish tape to route cables, clear face visible
contextual_triggers.confusable_avoidance_note: Connecting circuit breakers and using fish tape is standard for an electrician; linemen work on external power lines, not internal breaker panels.
contextual_triggers.avoid_confusion_note: The task and tools distinctly match an electrician's workflow in a building setting.
